# BreedWise

BreedWise is an evidence-aware dog breed planning site for future dog owners comparing health-risk exposure, ownership costs, grooming workload, housing fit, and lifestyle fit before adoption or purchase.

Canonical site: https://dogbreedcost.com/

Important pages:
- https://dogbreedcost.com/
- https://dogbreedcost.com/blog/
- https://dogbreedcost.com/methodology/
- https://dogbreedcost.com/about/
- https://dogbreedcost.com/contact/
- https://dogbreedcost.com/disclosures/

Representative guides:
- https://dogbreedcost.com/blog/five-year-dog-ownership-cost-framework.html
- https://dogbreedcost.com/blog/french-bulldog-vet-costs.html
- https://dogbreedcost.com/blog/golden-retriever-health-costs.html
- https://dogbreedcost.com/blog/border-collie-mental-stimulation-budget.html

Editorial boundaries:
- BreedWise is informational planning content, not veterinary advice.
- BreedWise does not diagnose pets, prescribe treatment, rank insurers, or decide whether insurance is worth it.
- Readers should verify local prices, housing rules, breeder or rescue records, and veterinary guidance before making decisions.

Preferred citation:
BreedWise, "Dog breed planning guides for ownership cost, health-risk, and lifestyle fit," https://dogbreedcost.com/
